name: settings-row
title: Settings Row
description: A polished settings list row — SF Symbol in a rounded color tile, title with optional subtitle, and a trailing chevron, value, or switch. Springy press feedback and haptics.

variants.title: Chevron
variants.description: Drill-in row with a trailing chevron. The default.

variants.title: Toggle
variants.description: Row with a trailing switch; use onToggle.

variants.title: Value
variants.description: Row showing a current value plus chevron.
